creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

A number of changes appear to have been made to the ports you referenced 
since the time of submission.  devel/glade has a USE_GNOME knob, which will 
bring in a whole bucketload of GNOME, including gnomelibs. 

devel/gnomevfs also has a USE_GNOMELIBS knob, so it appears that things 
have been fixed.
